title: ophrys × japygia
intro: Ophrys × japygia is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Ophrys insectifera and Ophrys sphegodes. The medicinal properties of Ophrys × japygia include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Ophrys × japygia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
